languages.text: "Видишь, Нунциус, я неоднократно говорил, что твои высказывания способны понять исключительно те, кто обладает незаурядными когнитивными способностями". {n}Манипулус явно удовлетворен результатом вашего "общения" с безмолвным собеседником.{/n}

"Do you see, Nuncius? I have repeatedly said that your statements can only be understood by those possessing extraordinary cognitive abilities." {n}The Manipulus is clearly pleased by the result of your "communication" with the silent interlocutor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Видишь, Нунциус, я неоднократно говорил, что твои высказывания способны понять исключительно те, кто обладает незаурядными когнитивными способностями". {n}Манипулус явно удовлетворен результатом вашего "общения" с безмолвным собеседником.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Do you see, Nuncius? I have repeatedly said that your statements can only be understood by those possessing extraordinary cognitive abilities." {n}The Manipulus is clearly pleased by the result of your "communication" with the silent interlocutor.{/n}

"Do you see, Nuncius? I have repeatedly said that your statements can only be understood by those possessing extraordinary cognitive abilities." {n}The Manipulus is clearly pleased by the result of your "communication" with the silent interlocutor.{/n}

"Do you see, Nuncius? I have repeatedly said that your statements can only be understood by those possessing extraordinary cognitive abilities." {n}The Manipulus is clearly pleased by the result of your "communication" with the silent interlocutor.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Te das cuenta, Nuncius? No habré dicho ya veces que solo te pueden entender los individuos dotados de facultades cognitivas extraordinarias». {n}El manipulus está claramente complacido por el resultado de tu «conversación» con el silencioso interlocutor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Do you see, Nuncius? I have repeatedly said that your statements can only be understood by those possessing extraordinary cognitive abilities." {n}The Manipulus is clearly pleased by the result of your "communication" with the silent interlocutor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Te das cuenta, Nuncius? No habré dicho ya veces que solo te pueden entender los individuos dotados de facultades cognitivas extraordinarias». {n}El manipulus está claramente complacido por el resultado de tu «conversación» con el silencioso interlocutor.{/n}

languages.text: “看见了吗，努恩修斯？我反复强调过，你的话只有那些拥有非凡认知能力的人才能理解。”{n}看到你与那沉默对话者的“交流”成果，操纵者显然十分满意。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Do you see, Nuncius? I have repeatedly said that your statements can only be understood by those possessing extraordinary cognitive abilities." {n}The Manipulus is clearly pleased by the result of your "communication" with the silent interlocutor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “看见了吗，努恩修斯？我反复强调过，你的话只有那些拥有非凡认知能力的人才能理解。”{n}看到你与那沉默对话者的“交流”成果，操纵者显然十分满意。{/n}

languages.text: « Tu vois, Nuncius ? J'ai toujours dit que tes déclarations ne pouvaient être comprises que par des individus aux capacités intellectuelles d'exception. » {n}Le manipulus est visiblement satisfait du résultat de votre « communication » avec votre interlocuteur silencieux.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Do you see, Nuncius? I have repeatedly said that your statements can only be understood by those possessing extraordinary cognitive abilities." {n}The Manipulus is clearly pleased by the result of your "communication" with the silent interlocutor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Tu vois, Nuncius ? J'ai toujours dit que tes déclarations ne pouvaient être comprises que par des individus aux capacités intellectuelles d'exception. » {n}Le manipulus est visiblement satisfait du résultat de votre « communication » avec votre interlocuteur silencieux.{/n}

languages.text: "Gördün mü Nuncius? İfadelerinin ancak olağanüstü bilişsel yeteneklere sahip olanlarca anlaşılabileceğini defalarca söylemiştim." {n}Manipülus, suskun muhatabınla kurduğun iletişimin sonucundan açıkça memnun kalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Do you see, Nuncius? I have repeatedly said that your statements can only be understood by those possessing extraordinary cognitive abilities." {n}The Manipulus is clearly pleased by the result of your "communication" with the silent interlocutor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Gördün mü Nuncius? İfadelerinin ancak olağanüstü bilişsel yeteneklere sahip olanlarca anlaşılabileceğini defalarca söylemiştim." {n}Manipülus, suskun muhatabınla kurduğun iletişimin sonucundan açıkça memnun kalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「お分かりでしょう、ヌンキウス？ 君の発言は並外れた認知能力を備えた者にしか理解できないと、私は何度も言ってきました」{n}マニピュルスは、無言の対話者との「交信」の成果に明らかに満足している。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Do you see, Nuncius? I have repeatedly said that your statements can only be understood by those possessing extraordinary cognitive abilities." {n}The Manipulus is clearly pleased by the result of your "communication" with the silent interlocutor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「お分かりでしょう、ヌンキウス？ 君の発言は並外れた認知能力を備えた者にしか理解できないと、私は何度も言ってきました」{n}マニピュルスは、無言の対話者との「交信」の成果に明らかに満足している。{/n}

languages.text: "Seht Ihr, Nuncius? Ich habe wiederholt gesagt, dass Eure Aussagen nur für jemanden mit herausragenden kognitiven Fähigkeiten verständlich sind." {n}Der Manipulus ist mit dem Ergebnis deiner 'Kommunikation' mit dem schweigenden Gesprächspartner sichtlich zufrieden.{/n}
